meaning: adj.鍙尰娌荤殑,鍖诲緱濂界殑
examples: Most skin cancers are completely curable.
Most skin cancers are completely curable if detected in the early stages.
What matters is understanding that aging is curable.
First of all, if MRSA is caught early, it's completely curable with one of the antibiotics.
Melastatin stuck out as being present in curable tumors but absent in nasty ones.
